description.zh: 把一个内部 Agent 能力包装成可以展示、下载、讲清楚实现方式的产品页面。
description.en: Package an internal agent capability into a product page that can be shown, downloaded, and clearly explained.

objective.zh: 为未来售卖 Agent 封装做准备，让每个能力都能被讲成产品。
objective.en: Prepare the system for selling agent packages by turning each capability into a clearly framed product.

implementationNotes.zh: 兵部负责拆解协作链路，工部负责制作页面与下载资产，礼部把整个过程整理成案例页，户部补充结果指标。
implementationNotes.en: Bingbu decomposes the collaboration chain, Gongbu builds pages and download assets, Libu turns the process into a case page, and Hubu adds outcome metrics.

description.zh: 界定这个 Agent 能解决什么问题、需要哪些输入、交付什么输出。
description.en: Define what problem the agent solves, which inputs it needs, and what outputs it delivers.

description.zh: 准备配置文件、Scale 文档、案例截图和下载入口。
description.en: Prepare config files, scale documents, case screenshots, and download entry points.

description.zh: 把挑战、方案、交付物和结果整理成产品详情页。
description.en: Turn the challenge, solution, deliverables, and outcomes into a product detail page.

inputDemo.content: 需求：把“礼部自动运营博客”做成一个能对外展示和售卖的 Agent 封装方案。

outputDemo.content: 生成一个产品案例页，说明挑战、解决方案、可下载内容、实现流程，以及最后的经营结果。

results.zh: 内部能力被重新包装成可以面向客户销售的产品。
results.en: An internal capability is reframed into a sellable customer-facing product.
